hooks.command: last_msg=$(git log -1 --format=%s 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$last_msg" != bump\ ldz-memory* ]]; then REPO=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); PLUGIN="$REPO/plugins/ldz-memory"; if [ -f "$PLUGIN/bin/bump-version" ]; then bash "$PLUGIN/bin/bump-version" patch && cd "$REPO" && git add "$PLUGIN/.claude-plugin/plugin.json" && git commit -m "bump ldz-memory to v$(grep '"version"' "$PLUGIN/.claude-plugin/plugin.json" | sed 's/.*: *"\(.*\)".*/\1/')" && git push; fi; fi
